who: procurement teams in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify, processing 10–50 invoices/month
offer: For procurement teams in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify processing 10–50 invoices/month, delayed supplier status updates cause missed discounts and late orders. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking of supplier status through emails and spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to track supplier status changes in real-time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement teams seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
Direct message 20-50 procurement teams with demo video
Participate in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try real-time supplier status alerts and manual entry for supplier information on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
